arts.ttl: Arsenal forced to chase Nico Williams as PRIORITY plan revealed
arts.sum: Leroy Sane is currently focused on signing a new contract with Bayern Munich, despite holding fresh talks with Arsenal in recent weeks. Arsenal forced to chase Nico Williams as PRIORITY plan revealed

arts.ttl: Luka Modric targeted by surprise club over summer free transfer
arts.sum: Qatar want to sign Luka Modric at the end of his Real Madrid contract this summer to help bolster the prestige of their Stars League.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid confirmed team vs Arsenal as Spanish club make bold statement for Champions League tie
arts.sum: Real Madrid have already confirmed their team to take on Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie on Tuesday evening. Team news was published on Real Madrid's X account at 5:36pm, with Mikel Arteta Arsenal's team not expected to be confirmed until after 6:45pm .

arts.ttl: Neymar predicts winner of Real Madrid vs Arsenal tie
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. has on Tuesday weighed in on the upcoming round of fixtures in the Champions League. European football’s premiere club competition is of course set to…

arts.ttl: Arsenal-Real Madrid lineups confirmed as Bukayo Saka decision revealed for Champions League quarter-final
arts.sum: Arsenal and Real Madrid confirm their starting lineups for their Champions League quarter-final first leg at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fabregas net worth, Man City interest, Mikel Arteta 'toxicity' verdict, Arsenal exit
arts.sum: The ex-Arsenal star remained as assistant head coach as Como won promotion to Serie A at the end of the 2023/24 season. Former Arsenal midfielder Cesc Fabregas may have retired from professional football two years ago, but he has since made an impressive start to life in management.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'given green light' to sign £60m RB Leipzig star as Andrea Berta faces huge decision
arts.sum: A £60m-rated RB Leipzig attacker reportedly gives the green light to a summer move to Arsenal, who tried and failed to land him in the summer of 2024.

arts.ttl: Arsenal midfielder eyeing summer transfer to Barcelona
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey is set to leave when his contract expires and reportedly hopes to join Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Injured Real Madrid superstar sets personal challenge – ‘Be ready by the end of May’
arts.sum: Injured Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal has revealed the personal challenge he has set for himself as he continues his recovery from a serious knee injury.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Arsenal vs Real Madrid, 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Arsenal in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League ’s Quarterfinals. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Alaba, Camavinga, Modric, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.
